mapper.select:
select concat('aircraft:', a.aircraft_id) as id, null as parent_id, a.aircraft_name as name, 'aircraft' as node_type, 1 as level, false as terminal, ( select count(1)
from subsystems s where s.aircraft_id = a.aircraft_id ) as child_count, ( select count(1) from subsystems s inner join equipments e on e.subsystem_id = s.subsystem_id inner join components c on c.equipment_id = e.equipment_id inner join part_templates pt on pt.component_id = c.component_id inner join part_instances pi on pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id where s.aircraft_id = a.aircraft_id ) as part_count from aircraft a
union all
select concat('subsystem:', s.subsystem_id) as id, concat('aircraft:', s.aircraft_id) as parent_id,
s.subsystem_name as name, 'subsystem' as node_type, 2 as level, false as terminal, ( select count(1)
from equipments e
where e.subsystem_id = s.subsystem_id ) as child_count,
( select count(1) from equipments e inner join components c on c.equipment_id = e.equipment_id inner join part_templates pt on pt.component_id = c.component_id inner join part_instances pi on pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id where e.subsystem_id = s.subsystem_id ) as part_count from subsystems s
union all
select concat('equipment:', e.equipment_id) as id, concat('subsystem:', e.subsystem_id) as parent_id, e.equipment_name as name, 'equipment' as node_type, 3 as level, false as terminal, ( select count(1) from components c
where c.equipment_id = e.equipment_id ) as child_count,
(
select count(1) from components c inner join part_templates pt on pt.component_id = c.component_id inner join part_instances pi on pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id where c.equipment_id = e.equipment_id ) as part_count from equipments e
union all
select concat('component:', c.component_id) as id, concat('equipment:', c.equipment_id) as parent_id, c.component_name as name, 'component' as node_type, 4 as level, false as terminal, ( select count(1) from part_templates pt
where pt.component_id = c.component_id ) as child_count, ( select count(1) from part_templates pt inner join part_instances pi on pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id where pt.component_id = c.component_id ) as part_count from components c
union all
select concat('part_template:', pt.part_template_id) as id, concat('component:', pt.component_id) as parent_id, pt.part_name as name, 'part_template' as node_type, 5 as level, true as terminal, 0 as child_count, ( select count(1) from part_instances pi where pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id ) as part_count from part_templates pt

select * from ( select concat('aircraft:', a.aircraft_id) as id, null as parent_id, a.aircraft_name as name, 'aircraft' as node_type, 1 as level, false as terminal, ( select count(1) from subsystems s where s.aircraft_id = a.aircraft_id ) as child_count, ( select count(1) from subsystems s inner join equipments e on e.subsystem_id = s.subsystem_id inner join components c on c.equipment_id = e.equipment_id inner join part_templates pt on pt.component_id = c.component_id inner join part_instances pi on pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id where s.aircraft_id = a.aircraft_id ) as part_count from aircraft a
union all
select concat('subsystem:', s.subsystem_id) as id, concat('aircraft:', s.aircraft_id) as parent_id, s.subsystem_name as name, 'subsystem' as node_type, 2 as level,
false as terminal, ( select count(1) from equipments e
where e.subsystem_id = s.subsystem_id ) as child_count, ( select count(1) from equipments e inner join components c on c.equipment_id = e.equipment_id inner join part_templates pt on pt.component_id = c.component_id inner join part_instances pi on pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id where e.subsystem_id = s.subsystem_id ) as part_count from subsystems s
union all
select concat('equipment:', e.equipment_id) as id, concat('subsystem:', e.subsystem_id) as parent_id,
e.equipment_name as name, 'equipment' as node_type, 3 as level,
false as terminal, ( select count(1) from components c
where c.equipment_id = e.equipment_id ) as child_count, ( select count(1) from components c inner join part_templates pt on pt.component_id = c.component_id inner join part_instances pi on pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id where c.equipment_id = e.equipment_id ) as part_count from equipments e
union all
select concat('component:', c.component_id) as id, concat('equipment:', c.equipment_id) as parent_id, c.component_name as name, 'component' as node_type, 4 as level,
false as terminal, ( select count(1) from part_templates pt where pt.component_id = c.component_id ) as child_count, (
select count(1) from part_templates pt
inner join part_instances pi on pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id where pt.component_id = c.component_id ) as part_count from components c
union all
select concat('part_template:', pt.part_template_id) as id, concat('component:', pt.component_id) as parent_id, pt.part_name as name, 'part_template' as node_type, 5 as level, true as terminal, 0 as child_count, ( select count(1) from part_instances pi where pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id
) as part_count from part_templates pt ) t where t.id = #{node_id}

select * from ( select concat('subsystem:', s.subsystem_id) as id, concat('aircraft:', s.aircraft_id) as parent_id, s.subsystem_name as name, 'subsystem' as node_type, 2 as level,
false as terminal, ( select count(1)
from equipments e where e.subsystem_id = s.subsystem_id ) as child_count, ( select count(1) from equipments e inner join components c on c.equipment_id = e.equipment_id inner join part_templates pt on pt.component_id = c.component_id inner join part_instances pi on pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id where e.subsystem_id = s.subsystem_id ) as part_count from subsystems s
union all
select concat('equipment:', e.equipment_id) as id,
concat('subsystem:', e.subsystem_id) as parent_id, e.equipment_name as name, 'equipment' as node_type, 3 as level, false as terminal, ( select count(1) from components c where c.equipment_id = e.equipment_id ) as child_count, ( select count(1) from components c inner join part_templates pt on pt.component_id = c.component_id inner join part_instances pi on pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id where c.equipment_id = e.equipment_id ) as part_count
from equipments e
union all
select concat('component:', c.component_id) as id,
concat('equipment:', c.equipment_id) as parent_id, c.component_name as name, 'component' as node_type, 4 as level, false as terminal, ( select count(1) from part_templates pt where pt.component_id = c.component_id ) as child_count, ( select count(1)
from part_templates pt inner join part_instances pi on pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id where pt.component_id = c.component_id ) as part_count from components c
union all
select concat('part_template:', pt.part_template_id) as id,
concat('component:', pt.component_id) as parent_id, pt.part_name as name, 'part_template' as node_type, 5 as level, true as terminal, 0 as child_count,
( select count(1) from part_instances pi where pi.part_template_id = pt.part_template_id ) as part_count from part_templates pt ) t where t.parent_id = #{node_id} order by t.level, t.name

select count(1) from ( select concat('aircraft:', aircraft_id) as parent_id from subsystems
union all
select concat('subsystem:', subsystem_id) as parent_id from equipments
union all
select concat('equipment:', equipment_id) as parent_id from components
union all
select concat('component:', component_id) as parent_id from part_templates ) t where t.parent_id = #{node_id}

select c.column_name as column_name,
c.ordinal_position as ordinal_position from information_schema.columns c where c.table_schema = database() and c.table_name = #{table_name} order by c.ordinal_position
select dq.* from design_quality dq where dq.part_template_id = ( select pi.part_template_id from part_instances pi where pi.part_instance_id = #{part_instance_id} limit 1 )
select count(1) from subsystems where aircraft_id = #{aircraft_id}
select count(1) from equipments where subsystem_id = #{subsystem_id}
select count(1) from components where equipment_id = #{equipment_id}
select count(1) from part_templates where component_id = #{component_id}
select count(1) from part_instances where part_template_id = #{part_template_id}
mapper.update: update aircraft set aircraft_name = #{aircraft_name}, update_time = now() where aircraft_id = #{aircraft_id}
update part_templates set part_name = #{part_name}, update_time = now() where part_template_id = #{part_template_id}

update part_instances set serial_number = #{serial_number}, batch_number = #{batch_number}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, production_date = #{production_date}, current_status = #{current_status}, quality_level = #{quality_level}, key_degree = #{key_degree}, update_time = now() where part_instance_id = #{part_instance_id}
mapper.insert: insert into part_instances ( part_instance_id, part_template_id, serial_number, batch_number, manufacturer, production_date, current_status, quality_level, key_degree, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{part_instance_id}, #{part_template_id}, #{serial_number}, #{batch_number}, #{manufacturer}, #{production_date}, #{current_status}, #{quality_level}, #{key_degree}, now(), now() )
mapper.update: update part_templates set part_number = #{part_number}, part_name = #{part_name}, material = #{material}, specification = #{specification}, update_time = now() where part_template_id = #{part_template_id}
mapper.select: select part_template_id, part_number, part_name, component_id, material, specification from part_templates where part_template_id = #{part_template_id} limit 1
select component_id, component_name, equipment_id from components where component_id = #{component_id} limit 1
select part_template_id, part_number, part_name, component_id, material, specification from part_templates where component_id = #{component_id} and part_number = #{part_number} limit 1

select part_template_id, part_number, part_name, component_id, material, specification, design_version, create_time, update_time from part_templates order by part_number asc, part_name asc, part_template_id asc
select part_template_id from part_templates order by part_template_id
select route_id from process_routes order by route_id
select process_def_id from process_definitions order by process_def_id
mapper.insert: insert into process_routes ( route_id, part_template_id, route_name, version, effective_date, is_active ) values ( #{route_id}, #{part_template_id}, #{route_name}, 'V1', curdate(), 1 ) on duplicate key update part_template_id = values(part_template_id), route_name = values(route_name), version = values(version), effective_date = values(effective_date), is_active = values(is_active)

insert into process_definitions ( process_def_id, route_id, process_number, process_name, equipment_type, standard_duration, is_key_process, is_high_risk ) values ( #{process_def_id}, #{route_id}, #{process_number}, #{process_name}, #{equipment_type}, null, 0, 0 ) on duplicate key update route_id = values(route_id), process_number = values(process_number), process_name = values(process_name), equipment_type = values(equipment_type)

insert into process_routes ( route_id, part_template_id, route_name, version, effective_date, is_active ) values ( #{route_id}, #{part_template_id}, #{route_name}, #{version}, #{effective_date}, #{is_active} ) on duplicate key update part_template_id = values(part_template_id), route_name = values(route_name), version = values(version), effective_date = values(effective_date), is_active = values(is_active)

insert into process_definitions ( process_def_id, route_id, process_number, process_name, equipment_type, standard_duration, is_key_process, is_high_risk ) values ( #{process_def_id}, #{route_id}, #{process_number}, #{process_name}, #{equipment_type}, #{standard_duration}, #{is_key_process}, #{is_high_risk} ) on duplicate key update route_id = values(route_id), process_number = values(process_number), process_name = values(process_name), equipment_type = values(equipment_type), standard_duration = values(standard_duration), is_key_process = values(is_key_process), is_high_risk = values(is_high_risk)

insert into aircraft ( aircraft_id, aircraft_name, aircraft_model, serial_number, status, remarks, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{aircraft_id}, #{aircraft_name}, #{aircraft_model}, #{serial_number}, #{status}, #{remarks}, now(), now() ) on duplicate key update aircraft_name = values(aircraft_name), aircraft_model = values(aircraft_model), serial_number = values(serial_number), status = values(status), remarks = values(remarks), update_time = now()

insert into part_templates ( part_template_id, part_number, part_name, component_id, material, specification, design_version, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{part_template_id}, #{part_number}, #{part_name}, #{component_id}, #{material}, #{specification}, #{design_version}, now(), now() ) on duplicate key update part_number = values(part_number), part_name = values(part_name), component_id = values(component_id), material = values(material), specification = values(specification), design_version = values(design_version), update_time = now()

insert into part_instances ( part_instance_id, part_template_id, serial_number, batch_number, manufacturer, production_date, current_status, quality_level, key_degree, image_url, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{part_instance_id}, #{part_template_id}, #{serial_number}, #{batch_number}, #{manufacturer}, #{production_date}, #{current_status}, #{quality_level}, #{key_degree}, #{image_url}, now(), now() ) on duplicate key update part_template_id = values(part_template_id), serial_number = values(serial_number), batch_number = values(batch_number), manufacturer = values(manufacturer), production_date = values(production_date), current_status = values(current_status), quality_level = values(quality_level), key_degree = values(key_degree), image_url = values(image_url), update_time = now()
mapper.select: select count(1) from part_templates where part_template_id = #{part_template_id}
select count(1) from part_instances where part_instance_id = #{part_instance_id}
select count(1) from process_routes where route_id = #{route_id}
select count(1) from process_definitions where process_def_id = #{process_def_id}
select count(1) from work_orders where work_order_id = #{work_order_id}
select count(1) from manufacturing_quality where manufacturing_quality_id = #{manufacturing_quality_id}
select count(1) from manufacturing_devices where device_id = #{device_id}
select part_instance_id, part_template_id from part_instances where part_instance_id = #{part_instance_id} limit 1
select route_id, part_template_id from process_routes where route_id = #{route_id} limit 1
select process_def_id, route_id from process_definitions where process_def_id = #{process_def_id} limit 1
select work_order_id, part_instance_id, route_id from work_orders where work_order_id = #{work_order_id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into work_orders ( work_order_id, part_instance_id, manufacturing_quality_id, route_id, production_line, start_time, end_time, operator, status ) values ( #{work_order_id}, #{part_instance_id}, #{manufacturing_quality_id}, #{route_id}, #{production_line}, #{start_time}, #{end_time}, #{operator}, #{status} ) on duplicate key update part_instance_id = values(part_instance_id), manufacturing_quality_id = values(manufacturing_quality_id), route_id = values(route_id), production_line = values(production_line), start_time = values(start_time), end_time = values(end_time), operator = values(operator), status = values(status)

insert into process_executions ( process_exec_id, work_order_id, process_def_id, device_id, start_time, end_time, operator, status ) values ( #{process_exec_id}, #{work_order_id}, #{process_def_id}, #{device_id}, #{start_time}, #{end_time}, #{operator}, #{status} ) on duplicate key update work_order_id = values(work_order_id), process_def_id = values(process_def_id), device_id = values(device_id), start_time = values(start_time), end_time = values(end_time), operator = values(operator), status = values(status)
